text:
Thessaloniki Student Housing | Thessaloniki students' accommodation in Ano Poli
Availabilities from September 2026!!
Hello Dear students!
​
​Welcome! Here, you will find detailed information about the building we offer exclusively for student accommodation in Thessaloniki. The building houses only young foreign students, providing a friendly and student-focused environment.
​
THE BUILDING
Our newly constructed building (completed in 2021) consists of 4 fully furnished and equipped luxury studios (each studio accommodates 1 student) and 1 fully furnished, 2-room luxury apartment (accommodating up to 2 students). In total, the building can host up to 6 students.
​
​THE LOCATION
The building is located in the traditional and picturesque area of Thessaloniki known as “Ano Poli” (“Upper Town”). You can find its exact location here. 
​​It is only 450 meters on foot from the University campus and 950 meters from the Medical School, approximately a 14-minute walk (see suggested walking route here). No need for public transportation or a car.
​
The neighborhood is quiet yet vibrant, with a traditional charm. It is close to supermarkets, pharmacies, hospitals, coffee shops, restaurants, parks, and tourist attractions. All city center destinations and the seafront are within walking distance. The area is a popular choice for students and young people, creating a lively and diverse community. Additionally, there is very little car traffic, making it a peaceful and safe environment.
​
BUILDING FEATURES
​
The building is new (2021), with a traditional design and high energy efficiency (external insulation). It has three levels:
​
Ground Floor (55sqm 2-room flat): This flat features a small private yard with its own entrance. Each room has a separate entrance from the yard, and both rooms share a common area with a kitchen, bathroom, and corridor. The flat can accommodate up to 2 students.
Second and Third Levels: These levels have a separate entrance and include 2 studios on each floor (4 in total, each 30sqm). Each studio has a private kitchen and bathroom and can accommodate 1 student.
​​
All floors are tiled, and the windows are double-glazed for energy efficiency and come with insect screens.
​
​THE EQUIPMENT
​
All rooms and studios are luxuriously furnished and fully equipped:
​
Studio:
Large bed (140x200cm) with storage underneath
Convertible sofa bed for visitors with storage
Desk with a chair
Wardrobe, drawers, and nightstand
Shoe racks
Modern kitchen with cabinets, fridge, sink, and 2 ceramic hot plates
Bathroom with shower, sink, mirror, and shelves
Hot water boiler
DAIKIN 12000 BTU air conditioner (heating and cooling)
32” LG FHD Smart TV
Shared washing machine, iron, ironing board, and vacuum cleaner (shared among 4 studios, free of charge)
​​
2-Room Flat:
One room with a large bed (140x200cm) and one with a single bed (90x200cm), both with storage underneath
Sofa and armchair (convertible to beds for visitors)
Desk with a chair, wardrobe, drawers, and nightstand in each room
DAIKIN 12000 BTU air conditioner in each room
32” LG FHD Smart TV in each room
Modern kitchen with a fridge, sink, cabinets, microwave oven and electric stove with an oven
Bathroom with shower, sink, mirror, and shelves
Shared washing machine, iron, ironing board, and vacuum cleaner (shared among 2 flatmates, free of charge)
Private yard with an automated watering system, table, and chairs
​
GENERAL CONDITIONS -RESTRICTIONS
​
Smoking, vaping, drugs, parties, alcohol misuse, conflicts, and pets are prohibited
Respect quiet hours, neighbors, and fellow housemates
Take care of the building, equipment, and furniture
You may host visitors for a few days
Maintain cleanliness, safety, and security
Report any issues to the owner promptly
​​
RENTAL – OTHER FEES
​
We offer an all-inclusive package: rental, utilities, and weekly cleaning fees (!) are bundled together. There are no hidden costs – you will always know exactly what to pay each month.
​
Utilities: Εlectricity, water, heating, cooling, hot water, 500 Mbps fiber internet via cable and Wi-Fi. Prepayment of utility costs is required for 4-month periods (3 payments per year).
Cleaning: Weekly cleaning of floors, windows, dusting, kitchen, and bathroom (does not include dishwashing). Prepayment of cleaning fees is also required for 4-month periods (3 payments per year).
WHAT TO BUY – BRING WITH YOU
​
You will need to bring towels, pillows, bed sheets, blankets, dishware, personal hygiene products, detergents, etc. We can assist you by providing some essentials upon request for a few days before your arrival, based on availability.
markdown:
# Thessaloniki Student Housing | Thessaloniki students' accommodation in Ano Poli

###### Availabilities from September 2026!!

Hello Dear students!

​

​Welcome! Here, you will find detailed information about the building we offer exclusively for student accommodation in Thessaloniki. The building houses only young foreign students, providing a friendly and student-focused environment.

​

THE BUILDING

Our newly constructed building (completed in 2021) consists of 4 fully furnished and equipped luxury studios (each studio accommodates 1 student) and 1 fully furnished, 2-room luxury apartment (accommodating up to 2 students). In total, the building can host up to 6 students.

​

​THE LOCATION

The building is located in the traditional and picturesque area of Thessaloniki known as “Ano Poli” (“Upper Town”). You can find its exact location [here](https://maps.app.goo.gl/WDeLRXSrj3G2oBfv8). 

​​It is only 450 meters on foot from the University campus and 950 meters from the Medical School, approximately a 14-minute walk (see suggested walking route [here](https://goo.gl/maps/LuzciLcK2Jz3LmbB7)). No need for public transportation or a car.

​

The neighborhood is quiet yet vibrant, with a traditional charm. It is close to supermarkets, pharmacies, hospitals, coffee shops, restaurants, parks, and tourist attractions. All city center destinations and the seafront are within walking distance. The area is a popular choice for students and young people, creating a lively and diverse community. Additionally, there is very little car traffic, making it a peaceful and safe environment.

​

BUILDING FEATURES

​

The building is new (2021), with a traditional design and high energy efficiency (external insulation). It has three levels:

​

*   Ground Floor (55sqm 2-room flat): This flat features a small private yard with its own entrance. Each room has a separate entrance from the yard, and both rooms share a common area with a kitchen, bathroom, and corridor. The flat can accommodate up to 2 students.
    
*   Second and Third Levels: These levels have a separate entrance and include 2 studios on each floor (4 in total, each 30sqm). Each studio has a private kitchen and bathroom and can accommodate 1 student.
    

​​

All floors are tiled, and the windows are double-glazed for energy efficiency and come with insect screens.

​

​THE EQUIPMENT

​

All rooms and studios are luxuriously furnished and fully equipped:

​

Studio:

*   Large bed (140x200cm) with storage underneath
    
*   Convertible sofa bed for visitors with storage
    
*   Desk with a chair
    
*   Wardrobe, drawers, and nightstand
    
*   Shoe racks
    
*   Modern kitchen with cabinets, fridge, sink, and 2 ceramic hot plates
    
*   Bathroom with shower, sink, mirror, and shelves
    
*   Hot water boiler
    
*   DAIKIN 12000 BTU air conditioner (heating and cooling)
    
*   32” LG FHD Smart TV
    
*   Shared washing machine, iron, ironing board, and vacuum cleaner (shared among 4 studios, free of charge)
    

​​

2-Room Flat:

*   One room with a large bed (140x200cm) and one with a single bed (90x200cm), both with storage underneath
    
*   Sofa and armchair (convertible to beds for visitors)
    
*   Desk with a chair, wardrobe, drawers, and nightstand in each room
    
*   DAIKIN 12000 BTU air conditioner in each room
    
*   32” LG FHD Smart TV in each room
    
*   Modern kitchen with a fridge, sink, cabinets, microwave oven and electric stove with an oven
    
*   Bathroom with shower, sink, mirror, and shelves
    
*   Shared washing machine, iron, ironing board, and vacuum cleaner (shared among 2 flatmates, free of charge)
    
*   Private yard with an automated watering system, table, and chairs
    

​

GENERAL CONDITIONS -RESTRICTIONS

​

*   Smoking, vaping, drugs, parties, alcohol misuse, conflicts, and pets are prohibited
    
*   Respect quiet hours, neighbors, and fellow housemates
    
*   Take care of the building, equipment, and furniture
    
*   You may host visitors for a few days
    
*   Maintain cleanliness, safety, and security
    
*   Report any issues to the owner promptly
    

​​

RENTAL – OTHER FEES

​

We offer an all-inclusive package: rental, utilities, and weekly cleaning fees (!) are bundled together. There are no hidden costs – you will always know exactly what to pay each month.

​

*   Utilities: Εlectricity, water, heating, cooling, hot water, 500 Mbps fiber internet via cable and Wi-Fi. Prepayment of utility costs is required for 4-month periods (3 payments per year).
    
*   Cleaning: Weekly cleaning of floors, windows, dusting, kitchen, and bathroom (does not include dishwashing). Prepayment of cleaning fees is also required for 4-month periods (3 payments per year).
    

WHAT TO BUY – BRING WITH YOU

​

You will need to bring towels, pillows, bed sheets, blankets, dishware, personal hygiene products, detergents, etc. We can assist you by providing some essentials upon request for a few days before your arrival, based on availability.
